intro: Set off on an unforgettable journey through the most picturesque corners of Europe. This time, just the two of you!
description:
For the first time, your favorite characters are traveling without the kids and enjoying time together. 
Exploring new places, and soaking up the atmosphere of true romance.
This is more than just a hidden object game. It’s a heartfelt story about love, discovery, and the beauty of the world around us.

What's new in Trip to Europe 12 Romantic Tour:
- Even more locations and details — every place is crafted with love and care for atmosphere.
- All-new scenes and puzzles — vibrant, varied, and full of charm.
- Enhanced search mechanics — more interactivity, diversity, and gameplay satisfaction.
- A cozy love story — romantic strolls, warm moments, and true closeness in scenic European settings.
- Updated design and interface — everything is smoother, more stylish, and easier to enjoy.
- Expanded souvenir collection — gather memorable items that capture the spirit of each country you visit.

Collector’s Edition includes:
- 18 extra locations
- 12 mini-games + 18 new puzzles
- A broader collection of unique souvenirs
